source_rationale: Cinnamon bark oil is a potent essential oil with reproductive-toxicity concerns reported in animal studies at high exposures; conservative guidance recommends avoiding during pregnancy and breastfeeding, especially in leave-on products. (Avoid topical medicinal/aromatherapy use; do not ingest.)
